# Before merging the pull request, please confirm the following
- [ ] You have read the contribution guidelines on [qnngds.readthedocs.io](https://qnngds.readthedocs.io/en/latest/src/contributing/contribute.html)
- [ ] All newly defined `Device`s are tagged with the `@qg.device` decorator.
- [ ] You have verified the documentation looks okay on readthedocs. See the linked action  in this PR labeled "docs/readthedocs.org:qnngds" for a link.
- [ ] You have chosen an appropriate semantic version following the guidelines on [qnngds.readthedocs.io](https://qnngds.readthedocs.io/en/latest/src/contributing/contribute.html#satisfied-with-your-code-ready-for-a-pull-request) and have updated pyproject.toml accordingly
